theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Authority, clarity, and function-first, but bold and modern. The objective is to make the app feel like a modern tech magazine cataloging knowledge. Strict grids, stark contrasts.

headings.rules: Tracking-tight, never center-aligned by default. Use fluid scaling text-4xl to text-6xl+ for heroes. NO Inter or Roboto for headings.

body.rules: Clean and objective. leading-relaxed for long text, tight for labels.

mono_and_tags.rules: Use for pricing, level badges, and technical meta-data (e.g., duration). Uppercase, wide spacing (tracking-widest), smaller text sizes (text-xs/text-sm).

color_palette.rules: High contrast minimal look. Pure monochrome structure with sudden sharp bursts of International Klein Blue (#002FA7) or Highlighter Yellow (#E4FF00) for calls to action, pricing highlights, or tags.

spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton, make the grid visible using border-collapse or 1px solid black borders around containers.
spacing_and_layout.paddings: p-8 to p-12 for major containers. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment. Asymmetry creates tension. Do NOT center everything.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-none), thick 1px or 2px black border, solid fill or transparent with heavy hover states. Use the primary accent color (#002FA7) for the main CTA.
components.cards_certificate_listings: Swiss Brutalism: 1px solid black border, 0px radius (rounded-none), flat background (White or Light Grey). Hover state translates card up by -4px and adds a harsh solid shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).
components.inputs_and_filters: Flat checkboxes, large touch targets, no generic drop shadows. Inputs have 1px solid border, focus state uses 2px solid primary color (#002FA7) ring.
components.badges: JetBrains Mono font, uppercase, text-xs, thick borders, highly visible background colors like #E4FF00 or #F4F5F6.
components.navigation: Sticky, solid background (bg-white) with 1px border-b border-black. Navigation links must be bold, visible on desktop.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Background color flips, borders thicken, or strict translation (-translate-y-1).

icons_and_assets.library: Use `react-icons/fa` or `react-icons/si` for all vendor logos (e.g., `FaAws`, `FaMicrosoft`, `FaGoogle`, `FaApple`) and UI icons. DO NOT use placeholder text or dummy image urls. If using Shadcn primitives, `lucide-react` is also acceptable for UI but not brand logos.
icons_and_assets.rules: Icons must match the stroke and weight of the typography. Vendor logos in the directory should be prominent and high-contrast.

hero_backgrounds.description: High contrast abstract grid, use with heavy opacity overlay or mix-blend-mode for the hero search section. Or use as a subtle dark background in a dedicated hero block.
Computer code screen, for tech learning context.

learning_context.description: Students focused in a modern computer lab. Good for 'About' or 'Learning paths' sections.
Person studying at desk. Good for dashboard motivation.

page_layouts.homepage: Massive typography in the hero section saying something like 'The Definitive Directory for Tech Certifications'. A large, prominent search bar stretching at least 8 columns in a 12-col grid. Below that, a layout for featured certificates. Sidebar for filters (Vendor, Level, Domain, Price) sticking to the left, and a dense list of certificate cards on the right. Every card explicitly shows Cost and Level.
page_layouts.certificate_detail_page: Split screen layout. Left side: fixed/sticky container holding the Certificate Name, Vendor Logo, Cost, Level, and primary CTA (e.g., 'View Official Docs'). Right side: scrolling content with detailed syllabus, pre-requisites, recommended YouTube video links (use YouTube embeds or stylised links), and practice tests.
page_layouts.dashboard: Minimal control-room grid. Saved certificates displayed as dense rows rather than massive cards. Quick links to resume learning.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts properly in index.css using the provided imports.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto for anything.
DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards without modifying them. Strip away rounded corners and soft shadows. Apply `rounded-none border-black border` instead.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='search-input', data-testid='filter-vendor-aws').
Use react-icons (e.g., FaAws, SiMicrosoftazure, SiGooglecloud) for Vendor logos instead of image placeholders.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; use solid white.
Ensure the hero search bar is exceptionally prominent, perhaps an entire row in the grid.
In the search result list, distinctly emphasize the PRICE and LEVEL using the high-contrast accent colors (#002FA7 or #E4FF00 background).
